forecasts.question: Will average sector integrity hold at or above 4.8 at the next daily anchor? (decay 0.05/tick, repairs only by signed acts)
Will there be at most 61 CRITICAL sectors (integrity below 25) at the next daily anchor? (currently 61)
Will average sector integrity hold at or above 51.2 at the next daily anchor? (decay 0.05/tick, repairs only by signed acts)
Will there be at most 1 CRITICAL sectors (integrity below 25) at the next daily anchor? (currently 0)

how: POST /api/forecast/stance {forecast_id, stance:"yes"|"no", pubkey, sig} — sig = ed25519 over utf8("forecast:"+id+":"+stance). One stance per key, immutable. The instruments settle it, not us.
